internal_issues.description: WIN-061 c4 H1: TLDR fields contradict rewritten detail_evidence after EXP-227. tldr_evidence asserted backwards suppression mechanism; tldr_verdict said suppression is standard ionospheric physics — both refuted by new detail text.
WIN-061 c4 H2: detail_verdict_text actively contradicted rewritten detail_evidence after EXP-227 (asserted suppression is ionospheric physics).
WIN-061 c3/c4 H4: Unscored-vs-observed contradiction not surfaced. Added explicit contradiction sentence at end of V51.1 Update paragraph.
WIN-061 c4 H5: SPE vs geomagnetic storm conflation in paragraph 1 (S&F 1999 studied SPEs, not CME-driven storms). Yeeted to EXP-232.
WIN-061 c4 H6: 'most often cited for storm-time SR perturbation' — unsupported citation-frequency claim. Fixed to 'often cited in the storm-time SR literature'.
WIN-061 c4 H7: 'coin-flip' rhetoric oversimplifies PRED-SR-SUPPRESS (3 dimensions). Replaced with 3-dimension framing.
WIN-061 c4 H8: H_eff averaging method still undisclosed. All 3 methods overshoot but text omits disclosure. Yeeted to EXP-233.
WIN-010 c7 H1: P7 asymmetric test setup — dome has 9 published FSFs; globe uses our Kim & Chang fit (not published as predictive). Yeeted to EXP-234.
WIN-010 c7 H2: P7 coverage formula assumes linear multiplicative factor for both models; dome FSF is H(r)/r geometric ratio. Yeeted to EXP-234.
Design: Bar chart heading 'How the 71 claimed wins actually land' vs meta/subtitle reference to 69 dome-claimed wins. Requires generate-html.js disambiguation. Human/infrastructure change.
Design: Verdict bar chart percentages sum to 101% (rounding artifact). Requires generate-html.js fix (decimal rounding or caption). Human/infrastructure change.
Design: Unfalsifiable bar aria-label doesn't mention combined Misleading/Unfalsifiable section link. Requires generate-html.js aria-label update. Human/infrastructure change.
FAIL-009 outcome text stale (94h/6 polls). Updated to 118h/8 polls/7 byte-identical/5-day drought crossed.
